title: TechCorp Employee Handbook
content:
# TechCorp Employee Handbook

## 1. Welcome to TechCorp

TechCorp is a leading technology company focused on innovation and excellence.
We employ over 5,000 people across 7 departments.

## 2. Employment Policies

### Equal Opportunity Employment
TechCorp is an Equal Opportunity Employer and does not discriminate based on
race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected characteristic.

### At-Will Employment
Employment with TechCorp is at-will. Either the employee or the company may
terminate employment at any time, with or without cause.

## 3. Code of Conduct

All employees are expected to:
- Treat colleagues with respect
- Maintain confidentiality of proprietary information
- Follow all applicable laws and regulations
- Report unethical behavior to HR or management

## 4. Workplace Harassment and Discrimination

TechCorp has a zero-tolerance policy for harassment or discrimination.
All complaints should be reported to HR immediately.

## 5. Health and Safety

TechCorp maintains a safe work environment. All employees must:
- Follow safety guidelines
- Report hazards immediately
- Participate in safety training
author: HR Department

title: Compensation and Benefits Policy
content:
# Compensation and Benefits Policy

## Base Salary Ranges (2026)

### Engineering Department
- IC1 (Junior): $60,000 - $85,000
- IC2 (Mid-level): $85,000 - $120,000
- IC3 (Senior): $120,000 - $160,000
- IC4 (Staff): $160,000 - $210,000
- IC5 (Principal): $210,000 - $300,000

### Sales Department
- Account Executive: $80,000 - $150,000 (+ commission)
- Sales Manager: $150,000 - $250,000
- VP Sales: $300,000 - $500,000

### Other Departments
Salary ranges available upon request from HR.

## Performance Bonus

Eligible employees receive annual performance bonuses:
- Executives: 20-50% of base salary
- Managers: 15-30% of base salary
- Individual Contributors: 10-20% of base salary

Bonus eligibility determined by role and performance rating.

## Stock Options

Stock options granted at hire and annual refreshes:
- New hire grant: 5,000 - 50,000 shares (based on level)
- Annual refresh: up to 20% of previous year grant
- 4-year vest with 1-year cliff
author: Finance & HR

title: Paid Time Off Policy
content:
# Paid Time Off (PTO) Policy

## PTO Allocation

All full-time employees receive paid time off:
- Individual Contributors: 15 days/year
- Managers: 20 days/year
- Directors and Executives: 25 days/year

PTO resets January 1st each year. Unused PTO does not roll over.

## Holidays

TechCorp observes the following holidays:
- New Year's Day (Jan 1)
- MLK Day (Jan 20)
- Presidents Day (Feb 17)
- Memorial Day (May 26)
- Independence Day (July 4)
- Labor Day (Sept 1)
- Thanksgiving (Nov 27)
- Christmas (Dec 25)

## Sick Leave

Sick leave is separate from PTO. Employees may take up to 10 sick days/year
for their own illness or to care for a family member.

## Parental Leave

- Primary caregiver: 16 weeks paid
- Secondary caregiver: 8 weeks paid
- Adoption: 8 weeks paid
author: HR Department

title: Travel and Expense Policy
content:
# Travel and Expense Policy

## Travel Budget Authorization

All business travel must be pre-approved by manager and follows these limits:

### Domestic Travel
- IC1-IC2: $3,000/trip limit, $15,000/year limit
- IC3-IC4: $5,000/trip limit, $25,000/year limit
- IC5+: $10,000/trip limit, no annual limit
- Managers: $5,000/trip limit, $30,000/year limit
- Directors+: $10,000/trip limit, no annual limit

### International Travel
- All international travel requires VP approval
- Budget limits 50% higher than domestic equivalent

## Airfare Guidelines

- Book flights at least 7 days in advance
- Use economy class for flights under 6 hours
- Business class permitted for flights over 8 hours (requires VP approval)
- Use company travel portal for all bookings

## Hotel Guidelines

- Book hotels within 3 miles of meeting location
- Maximum rates:
  - Tier 1 cities (NYC, SF, LA): $350/night
  - Tier 2 cities: $250/night
  - Tier 3 cities: $150/night

## Meal and Entertainment

- Breakfast: up to $15
- Lunch: up to $20
- Dinner: up to $50
- Client entertainment: up to $100 (requires manager pre-approval)

## Expense Reports

All expenses must be submitted within 30 days of trip completion.
Receipts required for all expenses over $25.
Late submissions may be denied.
author: Finance Department

title: Department Budget Guidelines
content:
# Department Budget Guidelines (FY 2026)

## Budget Allocation

Engineering: $2,000,000 (40% of operating budget)
Sales: $1,500,000 (30%)
Marketing: $800,000 (16%)
Operations: $400,000 (8%)
HR: $300,000 (6%)

## Spending Authorization Limits

- IC1-IC2: $500 approval limit
- IC3: $2,000 approval limit
- Manager: $5,000 approval limit
- Director: $25,000 approval limit
- VP: $100,000 approval limit
- CFO: Unlimited

## Budget Review Schedule

- Q1 Budget Planning: Nov 15 - Dec 15
- Q2 Mid-year Review: March 15
- Q3 Reforecast: June 15
- Q4 Year-end Close: September 15

## Approval Process

All budget changes require:
1. Department head sign-off
2. CFO review
3. CEO approval for >$100K changes
author: CFO

title: System Architecture Overview
content:
# TechCorp System Architecture

## Overview

TechCorp's platform is built on a microservices architecture running on Kubernetes.

## Core Components

### API Gateway
- Kong-based API gateway
- Rate limiting: 1,000 requests/second per customer
- Authentication via OAuth 2.0

### Microservices
- User Service (Python/FastAPI)
- Data Service (Go/gRPC)
- Analytics Service (Scala/Akka)
- ML Pipeline (Python/Airflow)

### Data Layer
- Primary: PostgreSQL (replicated, 500GB+)
- Cache: Redis (100GB)
- Data Lake: S3 (10TB+)

### Infrastructure
- Kubernetes: 200+ nodes
- GCP: 50% compute spend
- AWS: 40% storage spend
- Azure: 10% for legacy systems

## SLAs

- API Uptime: 99.99%
- Data Consistency: < 5 second replication lag
- Query Latency: p95 < 500ms
author: VP Engineering

title: Remote Work Policy
content:
# Remote Work Policy

## Eligibility

All employees are eligible for remote work, except those in roles requiring physical presence:
- Office Management
- Facilities
- Reception

## Work Arrangements

### Full Remote
- Available to all eligible employees
- Must work core hours: 10am-3pm PT
- Participate in in-person events quarterly

### Hybrid
- 3 days in office, 2 days remote
- Preferred for managers with direct reports
- Office days: Monday-Wednesday

### In-Office
- Select roles (to be determined by department)
- Office is located in SF, NYC, and Seattle

## Equipment Allowance

- Full remote: $2,000/year home office budget
- Hybrid: $500/year equipment budget
- In-office: Provided by company

## IT Security

Remote workers must:
- Use VPN for all network access
- Enable 2FA on all accounts
- Keep all devices updated
- Never work from public wifi
author: Operations

title: GDPR Compliance Policy
content:
# GDPR Compliance Requirements

## Data Subject Rights
- Right to access (within 30 days)
- Right to rectification
- Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
- Right to restrict processing
- Right to data portability

## TechCorp Obligations
- Maintain data inventory
- Conduct DPIAs for new processing
- Report breaches within 72 hours
- Appoint DPO
- Document all processing

## Employee Data Handling
- Only process for HR/payroll/benefits
- No cross-border transfer without consent
- Retention: max 7 years after separation
- Audit trail required for sensitive access
author: Legal

title: Mission and Values
content:
# TechCorp Mission and Values

## Our Mission

To empower businesses through innovative technology solutions that drive growth,
efficiency, and sustainability.

## Our Values

### Innovation
We invest in R&D and encourage employees to experiment and take calculated risks.

### Excellence
We maintain high standards in everything we do.

### Integrity
We operate with honesty and transparency.

### Collaboration
We believe great things happen when diverse teams work together.

### Sustainability
We're committed to environmental and social responsibility.
author: CEO
